overall.description: Game footage of a fantasy character in armor exiting a dark stone corridor and crossing a torch-lit bridge toward a massive medieval castle under a starry night sky. The third-person camera follows the character walking across the bridge before continuing alone to the castle entrance.

large stone archway leading to darkness outside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit stone corridor with rough-hewn walls and cobblestone flooring. The armored character walks toward a large arched doorway ahead, then turns left and exits the frame, leaving the empty corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: torch-lit stone bridge under starry sky

events.description: fade from black reveals outdoor night scene with burning braziers and castle
character ahead exits frame to the left and disappears from view

agents.ego_description: following a silhouetted character across the long bridge toward the distant castle

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the bridge toward the castle entrance

tall stone pillar with flames lighting the left side
tall stone pillar with flames lighting the right side

dark blue night sky filled with stars and milky way

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from black to a wide-open starry night, revealing a long stone bridge illuminated by burning braziers. The camera follows a silhouetted character walking ahead toward a massive castle fortress in the distance. The character continues walking until exiting the frame to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge approach with castle walls rising ahead

events.description: passing the burning braziers, entering darker shadow of the castle
trees become visible flanking both sides of the bridge approach

agents.ego_description: continuing across the bridge alone after the other character has exited, approaching the castle walls

entered.detail: dark silhouetted trees appearing on the left side of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The camera continues forward across the bridge alone, leaving the burning braziers behind. The castle walls loom larger ahead, gradually blocking more of the starry sky. Dark trees become visible flanking both sides of the approach as the bridge leads deeper toward the fortress.

events.description: beginning ascent of stone stairs toward the castle entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the large wooden door at the castle entrance, climbing the final stairs

entered.detail: massive stone archway framing the castle door
wide stone steps leading up to the entrance
large dark wooden door at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the castle entrance, leaving the open bridge behind. The starry sky is now mostly blocked by the towering castle walls. The camera ascends the wide stone stairs toward the massive wooden door framed by a stone archway, with dark trees flanking the final approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit stone corridor that leads toward an open exit. It begins within a narrow passage characterized by rough-hewn walls and cobblestone flooring, tracking an armored character as they walk forward. As the character approaches a large arched doorway, the perspective maintains its steady pace through the oppressive gloom. The scene then shifts as the character turns left and exits the frame, leaving the camera to linger in the now empty, silent corridor.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement from an open, starry night across a torch-lit bridge toward the imposing entrance of a massive castle fortress. It begins with a wide view of the starry sky and burning braziers as the camera follows a silhouetted character walking ahead, who eventually exits the frame to the left. As the camera continues alone across the bridge, the burning braziers recede and the towering castle walls loom larger, gradually obscuring the stars while dark trees emerge to flank the approach. The scene then shifts from the open bridge to the fortress's immediate perimeter, where the sky is almost entirely blocked by stone. Finally, the camera ascends a set of wide stone stairs, moving past the flanking trees toward a massive wooden door framed by a stone archway.
